CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL( IP_Status__c , "Inactive") ,(IMAGE("/resource/Images/PayProfileInactiveBlack.png", "Pay Profile Inactive")),IF((P45_Requested__c = TRUE && RecordType.Name = 'PAYE'),(IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=0151n000002u0Mx", "Leaver")),IF( NOT( ISBLANK( IP_MissingPayrollDetail__c ) ) , (IMAGE("/resource/Images/PayProfileIncompleteRed.png", "Pay Profile Incomplete")), (IMAGE("/resource/Images/PayProfileCompleteGreen.png", "Pay Profile complete")))))
CustomField.label: Payroll Status
